response.justification: Bogdan has strong full-stack engineering experience, entrepreneurial initiative with GISCollective, and demonstrable technical depth across languages and systems, but lacks clear evidence of AI/ML product leadership, cloud platform strategy experience, or the 15-year technical trajectory required for a director-level AI strategy role.
strengths: Proven entrepreneurial spirit with open-source AI-adjacent platform (GISCollective)
Broad technical fluency across languages, cloud tools (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes), and systems
Strong communication and knowledge-sharing track record via workshops and public talks
concerns: No explicit AI/ML product development or cloud AI platform strategy experience
Timeline suggests less than 15 years of professional engineering experience (2009–present = ~15 years, but early roles are junior/freelance)
Lacks advanced degree in AI or recognized public expertise in AI research or commercial AI systems
